extraction.one_line_summary: HERMANS Ben attacked inside final kilometer on uphill finish, overpowering KUDUS who had jumped earlier, taking COSTA as stage winner and race leader
tactical_patterns: BMC's Hermans waited for Kudus to commit first on penultimate climb finish, then used superior power to counter-attack inside 1km
Aqua Blue's Norman Hansen bridged solo from penultimate climb but was absorbed 2km out, revealing team isolation tactics failed
Peloton allowed 7:55 gap before chasing hard on penultimate climb, suggesting teams calibrated catch point to final ascent

rider_signals.HERMANS Ben: positive: demonstrated sprint timing discipline by waiting for Kudus commitment before unleashing superior finishing power on uphill
rider_signals.KUDUS Merhawi: negative: jumped too early on final climb, lacked finishing kick when Hermans countered despite good positioning
rider_signals.NORMAN HANSEN Lasse: negative: isolated without Aqua Blue support despite white jersey, caught 2km out after solo bridge attempt
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: neutral: strong second place but passive tactics suggest couldn't match Hermans' finishing acceleration
